    Constructor
    Description
     
    CoffBytes(CoffFile coff, String name, CoffSectionFlags characteristics, byte[] bytes)
    Creates a bytes section with in-memory data.
     
    CoffBytes(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser, String name, int physicalAddress, int virtualAddress, int sizeOfRawData, int pointerToRawData, int pointerToRelocations, int pointerToLineNumbers, int numberOfRelocations, short numberOfLinenumbers, CoffSectionFlags characteristics)
    Creates a bytes section by reading from a COFF parser.
     
    CoffUninitialized(CoffFile coff, String name, CoffSectionFlags characteristics, int virtualSize)
    Creates an uninitialized section.
     
    CoffUninitialized(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser, String name, int physicalAddress, int virtualAddress, int sizeOfRawData, int pointerToRawData, int pointerToRelocations, int pointerToLineNumbers, int numberOfRelocations, short numberOfLinenumbers, CoffSectionFlags characteristics)
